mapper.select: SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, password, sns_provider, sns_id, name, email, userLevel, created_at, update_at, last_login, enabled, profile_photo FROM member1 m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id WHERE m1.login_id = #{login_id} AND password = #{password} AND enabled != 0

SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, password, sns_provider, sns_id, name, email, userLevel, created_at, update_at, last_login, enabled, profile_photo FROM member1 m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id WHERE sns_provider = #{sns_provider} AND sns_id = #{sns_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE member1 SET last_login = SYSDATE, failure_cnt = 0 WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member1(member_id, login_id, password, sns_provider, sns_id, userLevel, enabled, created_at, update_at, failure_cnt) VALUES (#{member_id}, #{login_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sns_provider, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sns_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 1, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 0)

INSERT INTO member2(member_id, name, birth, email, receive_email, tel, profile_photo, zip, addr1, addr2, ipAddr) VALUES (#{member_id}, #{name}, TO_DATE(#{birth}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{email}, #{receive_email}, #{tel}, #{profile_photo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddr})
mapper.update: INSERT ALL INTO member1(member_id, login_id, password, sns_provider, sns_id, userLevel, enabled, created_at, update_at, failure_cnt) VALUES (member_seq.NEXTVAL, #{login_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sns_provider, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sns_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 1, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 0) INTO member2(member_id, name, birth, email, receive_email, tel, profile_photo, zip, addr1, addr2, ipAddr) VALUES (member_seq.CURRVAL, #{name}, TO_DATE(#{birth}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{email}, #{receive_email}, #{tel}, #{profile_photo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddr}) SELECT * FROM dual

INSERT ALL INTO member1(member_id, sns_provider, sns_id, userLevel, enabled, created_at, update_at) VALUES (#{member_id}, #{sns_provider}, #{sns_id}, 1, 1, SYSDATE, SYSDATE) INTO member2(member_id, name, email, ipAddr) VALUES (#{member_id}, #{name}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) SELECT * FROM dual
mapper.select: SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, password, sns_provider, sns_id, email, userLevel, enabled, created_at, update_at, last_login, name, TO_CHAR(birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') birth, email, tel, profile_photo, zip, addr1, addr2, receive_email FROM member1 m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id WHERE m1.member_id = #{member_id}

SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, password, sns_provider, sns_id, email, userLevel, enabled, created_at, update_at, last_login, name, TO_CHAR(birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') birth, email, tel, profile_photo, zip, addr1, addr2, receive_email FROM member1 m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id WHERE m1.login_id = #{login_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE member1 SET enabled = #{enabled} WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
UPDATE member1 SET userLevel = #{userLevel} WHERE member_id = #{member_id}

UPDATE member1 SET login_id = #{login_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sns_provider = #{sns_provider, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sns_id = #{sns_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{password}, update_at = SYSDATE WHERE member_id = #{member_id}

UPDATE member2 SET email = #{email}, birth = TO_DATE(#{birth}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), tel = #{tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, profile_photo = #{profile_photo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zip = #{zip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addr1 = #{addr1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addr2 = #{addr2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, receive_email = #{receive_email} WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
UPDATE member2 SET profile_photo = '' WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
mapper.select:
SELECT m1.member_id, NVL(login_id, sns_id) login_id, name FROM member1 m1 JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id
m1.member_id != #{member_id} AND
( NSTR(m1.login_id, #{kwd}) >= 1 OR INSTR(m1.sns_id, #{kwd}) >= 1 )
INSTR(${schType}, #{kwd}) >= 1
